Information overload. 15 * 16 * After: 7 destinations. The 4 thematic groups (Conclusions, Review, 17 * Library, Ops) each have a single top-nav entry; the siblings inside 18 * each group live in the sub-nav (``, one row below). 19 * 20 * Dashboard · Upload · Conclusions · Review · Library · Publication · Ops 21 * 22 * Clicking a group label (e.g. "Review") takes you to the group's default 23 * tab ("/contradictions"), from which the sub-nav lets you jump to peers. 24 * 25 * Each entry can declare a `requires` predicate; if present, the link 26 * is omitted for callers whose role doesn't satisfy it. Today the only 27 * gated link is `/upload` (write-only) and `/founders/manage` (admin- 28 * only). The rest are read-accessible to every signed-in role. 29 */ 30 type RoleGate = (role: string) => boolean; 31 32 const TOP_NAV_LINKS: ReadonlyArray<{ 33 href: string; 34 label: string; 35 requires?: RoleGate; 36 }> = [ 37 { href: "/dashboard", label: "Dashboard" }, 38 // Hidden for viewers — the upload page itself also rejects them, but 39 // hiding the link keeps the nav honest about what they can do. 40 { href: "/upload", label: "Upload", requires: canWrite }, 41 // "Library" is the org-wide transparency surface: everyone sees every 42 // upload + who put it there, with owner-only delete + peer-request 43 // delete flows. Sits next to Conclusions because it's the visual 53 // complement to the conclusion list. 54 { href: "/explorer", label: "Explorer" }, 55 // The three group entries below follow the SUB_NAV_GROUPS order; 56 // clicking them lands on that group's default tab. 57 { href: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[0].defaultHref, label: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[0].topLabel }, 58 { href: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[1].defaultHref, label: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[1].topLabel }, 59 { href: "/publication", label: "Publication" }, 60 { href: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[2].defaultHref, label: SUB_NAV_GROUPS[2].topLabel }, 61 // Admin-only: the founder-role management page. Slotted at the 62 // end so non-admins (the common case) see no shift in the bar's 63 // layout when the link is absent. 64 { href: "/founders/manage", label: "Manage", requires: canManageFounders }, 65 ]; 66 67 export default function Nav({ 68 founder, 69 }: { 70 founder: { 71 name: string; 72 username: string; 73 organizationSlug?: string; 74 role?: string; 75 } | null; 76 }) { 77 const pathname = usePathname(); 78 const router = useRouter(); 79 80 const activeGroup = findGroupForPath(pathname); 81 82 function isActive(href: string): boolean { 83 // A top-nav entry is "active" either because the URL matches it directly 84 // or — for group entries — because we're on one of its sibling pages. 85 if (pathname === href || pathname.startsWith(href + "/")) return true; 86 if (activeGroup && href === activeGroup.defaultHref) return true; 87 return false; 88 } 89 90 // Filter the link list against the caller's role. The reward for a 19 * round of work well done is another round of work: the dashboard is 20 * the summit the figure never quite reaches, and the page is the 21 * fresh slope they return to. 22 */ 23 24 export default async function DashboardPage() { 25 const tenant = await requireTenantContext(); 26 if (!tenant) { 27 return null; 28 } 29 30 // The main "Uploads" panel only shows uploads the pipeline finished 31 // processing successfully. Failed / pending / processing uploads are 32 // still useful — founders need to know they exist and can retry them 33 // — but they don't belong on the landing page alongside the firm's 34 // canon. Other founders' dashboards are unaffected. 91 dashboardDismissals: { 92 none: { founderId: tenant.founderId }, 93 }, 94 }, 95 orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, 96 take: 8, 97 }); 98 99 // Active contradiction counter + pending conclusion-deletion counter 100 // for the integration banners (prompt 12). Both wrapped in a try in 101 // case the schema hasn't migrated yet (`status` column, new table). 102 let activeContradictions = 0; 103 let pendingConclusionDeletions = 0; 104 try { 105 activeContradictions = await db.contradiction.count({ 106 where: { 107 organizationId: tenant.organizationId, 108 status: "active", 109 }, 110 });
